name: Sanctuary Office Park
notes: 5-building commercial office campus. Building #1 reconciled from rentinfo#1.xls + lease PDFs; Buildings #2-5 loaded roster-level from the dashboard (lease terms pending rentinfo#2-5.xls). Crosby Development occupies Suite 101 in Building #1 as owner-occupant.

profile.involvement: Ground-up development complete — owned rental office complex
profile.description: Five Class A commercial office buildings with beautifully landscaped grounds. Suites range from 200 to 13,455 SF. Full-service lease structure includes janitorial, trash, property maintenance, and HVAC — no CAM charges, no year-end adjustments. Fixed 3% annual rent increases. Located 2 miles from the Causeway Bridge with easy access to New Orleans and Baton Rouge.

name: Mandeville Lake Apartments
notes: 12-building apartment community. 284 occupied, 9 vacant. Azalea (1BR/840SF), Elm (1BR/880SF), Bradford (2BR/1240SF), Cypress (2BR/1200SF), Dogwood (3BR/1482SF), Fern (3BR/1371SF).

profile.involvement: Ground-up development complete — owned rental apartment complex
profile.description: Luxury apartment community in Mandeville offering 1–3 bedroom units (840–1,482 SF) starting at $1,525/mo. Features elevators in every building, trash chutes on every floor, 9-ft ceilings, crown molding, fireplaces, ceiling fans, and open-concept kitchens with custom cabinetry. Amenities include a clubhouse, two pools, tennis courts, car washing station, 24-hour fitness center, and playground. 5 minutes from the Causeway Bridge.

name: Lakeside Village Townhomes
notes: 45-lot HOA community. 31 townhomes, 14 cottages. Crosby owns 11 lots (7 managed directly, 4 third-party). 30 owner-occupied lots. Monthly dues: $91,880 total.

profile.involvement: Ground-up development complete — partial unit ownership, partial property management contracts, full HOA management
profile.description: Gated luxury townhome and cottage community in the heart of Mandeville, just steps from the Causeway. Upgraded amenities include well-equipped kitchens, crown molding, granite countertops, double-car garages, controlled access, private pool, club room with fitness center, pond, and community center. Located off Rue Renoir, directly across from Mandeville High School.

name: Gulf South Commerce Park
notes: Industrial mega site undergoing horizontal development. Parcel 1-A sold. Remaining parcels for industrial/logistics/manufacturing users.

profile.address: I-12 & LA Hwy 1088, St. Tammany Parish, LA
profile.involvement: Horizontal development — selling building pads. One plat sold (Parcel 1-A)
profile.description: 919-acre industrial mega site in St. Tammany Parish, less than 50 miles north of New Orleans. Master-planned for Advanced Manufacturing and Logistics. Located at I-12 & Hwy 1088 with access to ports, rail, and major highways. Developed in partnership with St. Tammany Corporation and Parish Government. Selected as a Louisiana FastSites project (2026) under the $150M Site Investment & Infrastructure Fund. Parcels available from 1 to 189 acres — currently doing horizontal development and selling building pads.

name: The Sanctuary
notes: Luxury single-family HOA community. Crosby manages HOA and owns one rental unit. Multiple Crosby family members reside in community.

profile.involvement: HOA management. One owned rental property. Multiple family members reside in the community.
profile.description: Private gated community established in 1995 by Crosby Development Company on 1,170 acres less than 2 miles from Lake Pontchartrain. 400+ homesites surrounded by native wetlands, cypress marshes, and nature preserves. Amenities include a Health and Activity Center with tournament-sized pool, tennis courts, fitness facilities, and miles of walking/jogging/nature trails. Underground utilities. Lots from $215K–$676K; homes from $750K–$3.2M.

name: DeLimon Place
notes: Mixed-use development: townhomes, 2 apartment complexes, 3 HOAs. Limited Crosby involvement — owns some units and an office building. Managed alongside community associations.

profile.involvement: Limited remaining ownership — a few units + on-site office building. 3 separate HOAs. No HOA or property management involvement.
profile.description: Established in 1981, DeLimon Place is an Old Metairie icon. Townhomes and two apartment complexes across 3 separate HOAs on a single site. Townhomes are ~3,000 SF (3-story). Pristine common areas, inground pool, party room. Easy access to City Park, Downtown New Orleans, the French Quarter, and the airport.

name: Metairie Lake Apartments
notes: 108-unit apartment community in Metairie. Rent roll loaded from WDB file.

profile.involvement: Ground-up development complete — owned rental apartment complex
profile.description: Spacious 1 & 2 bedroom floor plans (696–1,230 SF) near New Orleans CBD, medical schools, and universities. Amenities include a swimming pool, courtyard, clubhouse, controlled access, fitness center, walk-in closets, and private patios/balconies. 10.7 miles from Louis Armstrong International Airport.

name: Metairie Plaza
notes: 66-unit apartment community in Metairie. 62 of 66 units parsed from WDB file; 4 boundary units pending.

profile.involvement: Ground-up development complete — owned rental apartment complex
profile.description: Centrally located in Metairie, minutes from the New Orleans CBD. Features 2 & 3 bedroom units (1,040–1,735 SF) including flats, townhomes, and executive townhomes. Amenities include a private swimming pool, ample off-street parking, covered carports, outdoor storage lockers, and professional on-site management.
